title: sphaerostephanos paripinnatus
intro: Sphaerostephanos paripinnatus is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos paripinnatus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
